name: chr19_19q13_2_PSG_xref
description: Cross-reference stub: pregnancy-specific glycoprotein (PSG) tandem cluster at 19q13.2 (~11 PSG paralogs PSG1-PSG11) — overlaps with the CEACAM array described in chr19_19q13_41_CEACAM_SIGLEC_cluster.json. Provided as a separate locus pointer because PSG genes are clinically relevant during pregnancy and behave as their own dosage unit.

architecture.internal_structure: ~11 PSG paralog genes plus pseudogenes in tandem at 90-98% identity over ~700 kb; intra-cluster SDs of 30-80 kb; common gene-content variation in human populations.
